name: Anjean

description: Anjean  is a character in Spirit Tracks. She is a member of the Lokomo people and the protector of the Tower of Spirits, the central hub of the Spirit Tracks, whose goal is to prevent the evil Malladus from breaking free of his imprisonment. Anjean p...

name: Animal Companion
first_appearance: The Legend of Zelda: Oracle of Seasons
description: The Animal Companions are three characters in Oracle of Seasons and Oracle of Ages: Ricky, Moosh, and Dimitri. They become Link's Mounts when he needs their special abilities to traverse certain terrain.

name: Angler Fish

description: The Angler Fish is a recurring Boss in The Legend of Zelda series.

name: Champion
first_appearance: The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild
description: The Champions are a team of five chosen from the five races of Hyrule to battle against Calamity Ganon. Led by Princess Zelda with the Champion hero chosen by the sword that seals the darkness at her side, the other four Champions were tasked with pi...

description: The Mad Batter is a recurring character in The Legend of Zelda series. He sleeps in altars found in underground caves, and Link may awaken him by sprinkling Magic Powder on these altars. The bat creature will then curse Link to punish him for having ...

name: Lion

name: Letter

description: Letters are recurring items and objects in The Legend of Zelda series. They are the most common means of long-distance communication between characters.

name: Lana

name: Puini
first_appearance: Unknown
description: Puini is Sir Raven's horse in the Oracle of Ages manga by Akira Himekawa. Although a minor character, it is instrumental in the defeating the sorceress Veran. The horse accompanies Raven on all of his travels and resides with him in the Hidden Villag...

first_appearance: The Legend of Zelda: A Link Between Worlds
description: Princess Hilda, also known simply as Hilda, is the princess of Lorule and a principal character in A Link Between Worlds. As she appears as a darker, brooding Lorulean version of Zelda, Hilda guides Link through the land of Lorule so he may rescue al...

name: Spryte
first_appearance: Unknown

description: Ralph is character in Oracle of Ages. He is Nayru's childhood friend and loyal guardian. Although he is stubborn and hotheaded, rarely pondering the consequences of his own actions, he is a noble character deep down. Due to his protective nature defe...

first_appearance: Unknown
